notes: Probe the Frontier. A new, riskier alternative to a routine Deep-Space Survey: push a probe straight at the frontier ring for 1 action + 30 fuel, spent whether it pays off or not - a lawless target can draw a pirate ambush, but a frontier world charted this way turns up richer 📡 signals. That richness isn't limited to probing either: any signal that lands on a frontier world now skews toward a stronger tier and a kind matching that world's character - salvage leads on lawless outposts, knowledge leads on relic/crystal-rich worlds.
